input.background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
input.question: (a) Comparison A: Group 1 | Group 2

output.answer: Group 1: x̄=50 and s=31.6. Group 2: x̄=50 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Same central locations; greater spread is Group 1.

Group1.description: The numerical data values for Group 1 as depicted in the stemplot.

Group2.description: The numerical data values for Group 2 as depicted in the stemplot.
